content_hints.description: Cassalanter Villa is an extravagant manse with dozens of lavish chambers for the masters of the house and their guests, though its splendor belies a terrible secret. The temple of Siamorphe that once lay beneath the estate has been desecrated by Victoro and Ammalia’s devil-worship, and now the great chapel is dedicated to the Lord of the Nine Hells.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see an extravagant manse with dozens of lavish chambers for the masters of the house and their guests, its splendor belied by a terrible secret. The grounds of the Cassalanters’ estate are patrolled by hired guards, and the air is thick with the scent of oil lamps and lanterns.

npcs.name: Ammalia Cassalanter
npcs.role: occupant of C25a, smoking and either staring dismally out toward the ocean or watching her children in the garden below

npcs.name: Victoro
npcs.role: involved in the desecration of the temple of Siamorphe by Ammalia’s devil-worship

npcs.name: Lady Esvele Rosznar
npcs.role: Lady of Rosznar Villa, situated on ThunderstaffWay between Copper Street and Shield Street in the Sea Ward, west of the High Road

event_triggers: On entry: Willifort appears from nowhere, immaculate and smiling, and offers to escort the party inside.

content_hints.description: Smoke and steam billow from the many windows around this indoor forge where metal weapons, armor, and tools are made. The forge is owned and operated by a fire genasi named Embric and a water genasi named Avi.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see crystal chandeliers throwing prismatic light across a dance floor vast enough to hold a hundred couples. The air smells of perfume, candle wax, and champagne.

npcs.name: Ammalia Cassalanter
npcs.dialogue: How delightful that you could attend. We so rarely have adventurers as guests -- you must tell me everything about your exploits. I find courage so... refreshing.
npcs.notes: Noblewoman, secret high priestess of Asmodeus. Charming, controlled, desperate. She and Victoro sold their children's souls to Asmodeus and need 999,999 gold pieces to buy them back. Will do anything -- anything -- to save her children.

event_triggers: On conversation (DC 16 Insight): Ammalia's smile never reaches her eyes. She steers every topic away from her children.

content_hints.description: Cassalanter Estate is a one-story, windowless stone house with a slate roof, tucked in the middle of an alley. Its doors are made of sturdy wood, and the outer door can be barred shut from within, requiring a successful DC 18 Strength (Athletics) check to break down.
content_hints.read_aloud:
[Cassalanter Estate]

You see the wine cellar stretch into shadow, its stone cradles holding thousands of bottles in orderly rows. The air is cool, still, and thick with the scent of old cork and tannin.

loot.name: Rare Amnian Wine (100 gp per bottle, 6 bottles)

event_triggers: On search (DC 14 Investigation): The false wall is discovered, revealing the passage to the Chapel below.

content_hints.description: Secret doors blend with the surrounding stonework on opposite sides of this sewer tunnel. One door opens into area B7, where helmets sized for a dwarf stand in the corners of this 20-foot-high room.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see walls of red-veined marble that swallow the torchlight, and iron sconces shaped like clawed hands grip flames that burn without flickering. The air is warm, thick with sulfur and something sweeter beneath it, like expensive perfume.

hazards.name: Desecrated ground (undead within have advantage on saves)

event_triggers: On entry: The candles flare and a voice like burning parchment whispers: 'Another supplicant? Or another sacrifice?'

content_hints.description: The Cassalanter Estate features cells with iron-banded wooden doors, some of which have small, barred windows embedded in them. A ring of keys hangs from a hook on a stone pillar in the Hall of the Damned, where the Cassalanters lure homeless Waterdavians to their estate.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see iron-banded doors opening onto a corridor of cells carved from bare rock. Most stand empty, their doors ajar, manacles hanging slack from the walls where wrists have struggled against them. One cell at the far end shows a straw mattress, a clay jug, and crude tally marks scratched into the stone wall beside the door.

npcs.name: Captured Zhentarim Agent
npcs.dialogue: They took the others for the ritual. Please -- I can hear the chanting at night. Whatever they are doing down there, it is getting louder.
npcs.notes: Zhentarim spy captured while investigating the Cassalanters. Knows the location of the ritual chamber. Will bargain information for freedom.

content_hints.description: The Cassalanters’ private library is a space where the scent of old parchment hangs thick in the air, with walls lined with tall shelves packed with colorful, leather-bound books.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see the scent of old parchment hanging thick in the air, and the walls are lined with tall shelves packed with colorful, leather-bound books.

hazards.name: Poison needle trap on vault door

event_triggers: On ledger read: The accounting reveals the Cassalanters are exactly 499,500 gold short of Asmodeus's price.

content_hints.description: The hideout of the Xanathar Guild operatives who snatched up Floon is deep in the city’s labyrinthine sewers. The floor plan of this locale can be reused for other hideouts.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a chamber vast and deep, its ceiling swallowed by darkness. A circle twenty feet across is drawn on the stone floor in something dark and glistening, and the air above it shimmers like a heat mirage. The ground trembles beneath your feet in a slow, rhythmic pulse, and a voice speaks words that press against the inside of your skull.
event_triggers: On combat start: Victoro does not stop chanting. He fights while maintaining concentration on the ritual. If uninterrupted for 3 rounds, a second Chain Devil emerges.
On defeat: The circle flares and collapses. Ammalia's scream echoes from somewhere above -- not grief for her husband, but for the ritual's failure.

content_hints.description: The grounds of the Cassalanter estate are patrolled by hired guards, and the estate is surrounded by a well-manicured lawn with a cobblestone path leading from the exterior gate to the front entrance and the coach house entrance. This estate is an extravagant manse with dozens of lavish chambers, and its splendor belies the terrible secret it holds.
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see a three-story mansion in the midst of picturesque green gardens dappled with hedges and water features. A tall white brick wall surrounds the estate, with a single wrought-iron gate as an entrance, bearing the Cassalanter family crest.

npcs.name: Ammalia Cassalanter
npcs.role: is smoking and either staring dismally out toward the ocean or watching her children in the garden below

npcs.name: Guards
npcs.role: patrol the grounds at any time

event_triggers: On exit: The grate locks behind you. There is no going back this way.
